Restaurant_Receipt_May2024: Proof of purchase establishing that the plaintiff was a customer at Central East Asian Cuisine on May 30, 2024, and specifically ordered the Big Plate Whole Chicken.
Dental_XRay_Records: Diagnostic images taken by the dentist showing the structural fracture of the tooth, providing objective medical evidence of the injury.
Itemized_Medical_Invoices: Detailed billing records for the tooth extraction and the $4,500 dental implant to substantiate the specific economic damages claimed.
Witness_Statements_Friends: Written accounts from the two companions present during the meal to corroborate that the injury occurred at the restaurant and was reported to the staff immediately.
Dentist_Clinical_Report: A professional evaluation from the treating dentist linking the tooth fracture to the trauma described in the incident, justifying the necessity of the implant.
Payment_Receipts_Treatment: Financial records proving the plaintiff out-of-pocket expenses for the dental procedures to support the total demand of $5,500.
